lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: OY! PARE! Halika, halika! Tingin ka lang, libre ang tingin!
lines.english: HEY! BUDDY! Come, come! Just look, looking is free!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Ako si Kuya Jojo — ang PINAKAMAGALING na tindera ng isda sa buong Baryo Alon! At sa kabilang baryo! At sa buong Pilipinas!
lines.english: I'm Kuya Jojo — the BEST fish vendor in all of Baryo Alon! And the next village! And all of the Philippines!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Bangus, tilapia, galunggong, lapu-lapu — lahat meron ako! Sariwang-sariwa, galing sa dagat kaninang umaga!
lines.english: Milkfish, tilapia, round scad, grouper — I have them all! Super fresh, from the sea this morning!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: At sa iyo, dahil bago ka — ESPESYAL na presyo! Magkano? Tanungin mo na lang! Haha!
lines.english: And for you, since you're new — SPECIAL price! How much? Just ask! Haha!

choices.tagalog: Ang lakas naman po ng boses niyo, Kuya!
choices.english: Your voice is so loud, Kuya!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Aha! Gusto mo bang bumili? Sige, pero dito sa palengke, kailangan mo marunong TUMAWAD!
lines.english: Aha! You want to buy? Sure, but here at the market, you need to know how to BARGAIN!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Ganito 'yan — sasabihin ko ang presyo, tapos tatawad ka. 'Kuya, masyado pong mahal! Puwede bang tawad?'
lines.english: Here's how it goes — I'll say the price, then you bargain. 'Kuya, that's too expensive! Can I get a discount?'

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Sasabihin ko, 'Ay, hindi puwede, lugi na ako!' Tapos tatawad ka ulit. Ganun 'yun! Parang sayaw!
lines.english: I'll say, 'Oh, that won't work, I'll be at a loss!' Then you bargain again. That's how it goes! Like a dance!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Tara, subukan natin! Isa, dalawa, tatlo — BILI NA!
lines.english: Come on, let's try it! One, two, three — BUY!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: AY NAKO! Talo na naman ako! Grabe ka talaga mag-tawad, ha!
lines.english: OH NO! I lost again! You're really something at bargaining, huh!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Sige, sige, sa iyo na 'yan. Pero sa susunod, hindi na 'ko magpapatalo! Haha!
lines.english: Fine, fine, it's yours. But next time, I won't lose! Haha!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Eto ang sukli mo. Timbang ko muna, ha — isa, dalawa... tama na 'yan, isang kilo!
lines.english: Here's your change. Let me weigh it first, okay — one, two... that's right, one kilo!

choices.tagalog: Salamat, Kuya Jojo! Masarap naman ang isda mo!
choices.english: Thanks, Kuya Jojo! Your fish is really good!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: MAGANDANG UMAGA! Bago pa lang ang isda! Kakarating lang galing sa bangka ni Tatay Andoy!
lines.english: GOOD MORNING! The fish is brand new! Just arrived from Tatay Andoy's boat!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Pag umaga, 'yan ang best na bumili — sariwa pa lahat! Bangus, dilis, galunggong!
lines.english: In the morning, that's the best time to buy — everything's still fresh! Milkfish, anchovy, round scad!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Tara, bumili ka na! Mauubusan ka pag tinagal-tagal mo pa!
lines.english: Come on, buy now! You'll miss out if you wait too long!

choices.english: How much is the milkfish today?

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Oy, tanghali na! Konti na lang ang natitira, ha! Mauubusan ka!
lines.english: Hey, it's noon! Only a few left, okay! You'll miss out!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Pag tanghali, baba na ang presyo kasi mainit na — kailangan mabenta agad!
lines.english: At noon, prices go down because it's hot — need to sell fast!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: So ngayon ang best time mo tumawad! Mura na — pero puwede pang mas mura! Haha!
lines.english: So now is your best time to bargain! It's cheap — but it can be even cheaper! Haha!

choices.tagalog: Tawad po, Kuya! Bente na lang!
Sige po, bibili na ako bago maubusan!
choices.english: Okay, I'll buy now before they're all gone!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Hapon na! Naglilinis na ako ng stall. Ubos na ang isda ko!
lines.english: It's afternoon! I'm cleaning my stall already. My fish is all sold out!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Maganda ang benta ngayon, salamat sa mga suki! Bukas ulit!
lines.english: Sales were good today, thanks to the regulars! Come back tomorrow!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Kung gusto mo ng isda bukas, pumunta ka nang maaga. Pag limang umaga, nandito na ako!
lines.english: If you want fish tomorrow, come early. By five in the morning, I'm already here!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Oy! Suka! Galing kay Kapitan? Naku, salamat, pare!
lines.english: Hey! Vinegar! From the Captain? Oh, thanks, buddy!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Alam mo ba, hindi kumpleto ang isda kung walang sawsawan? Suka at sili — 'yan ang secret!
lines.english: You know, fish isn't complete without dipping sauce? Vinegar and chili — that's the secret!

lines.speaker: kuya_jojo
lines.tagalog: Teka, eto — libre na, isang supot ng dilis. Pasalubong mo na lang sa sarili mo! Haha!
lines.english: Wait, here — free, one bag of anchovy. A gift to yourself! Haha!

choices.tagalog: Salamat, Kuya Jojo! Ang bait mo!
choices.english: Thanks, Kuya Jojo! You're so kind!
